Inclusion.IC1: The paper describes an empirical primary study in software engineering.
Inclusion.IC2: The paper is focused on predicting defects in a software system using machine learning techniques.
Inclusion.IC3: The paper discusses the use of software defect prediction methods in an industrial setting using an industrial database.

Exclusion.EC1: The paper was not a peer-reviewed article, conference proceeding, or book chapter.
Exclusion.EC2: The paper was written in a language other than English.
Exclusion.EC3: The paper was published before 01.01.2015 or appeared in the searched databases after 08.04.2022.
Exclusion.EC4: The same results were already published in another paper.
